recordCreatedAt.description: The date and time the record was created in the database (RFC 3339 format)

recordUpdatedAt.description: The date and time the record was last updated in the database (RFC 3339 format)

recordCreatedBy.description: Identifier/UID of the user or system component that created the record

recordUpdatedBy.description: Identifier/UID of the user or system component that last updated the record

schemaVersion.description: The schema schema revision version of this document type
